nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Dalton was born in 1390, in Althorp, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Sir John Dalton jr, was 56 and his mother, Isabel de Pilkington, was 24. He had at least 2 daughters with Katherine Venables. He died in 1442, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Dalton est né en 1390, à Althorp, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dalton jr, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Pilkington, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Katherine Venables. Il est décédé en 1442, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Dalton 1390 in Althorp, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Dalton jr 56 und seine Mutter Isabel de Pilkington 24. Er hatte mit Katherine Venables mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 52 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Dalton è nato il nel 1390 nel Althorp, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Dalton jr, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Pilkington, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Katherine Venables. Morì nel 1442, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Daltonが1390年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアルソルプで生まれた時，父Sir John Dalton jrは56歳，母Isabel de Pilkingtonは24歳であった。彼はKatherine Venablesとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1442年にイギリスイギリスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Dalton(이)가 1390년 영국 노르섬프토실르 알소에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Dalton jr(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Pilkington(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Katherine Venables(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 영국 잉글랜드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Dalton nasceu em 1390, em Althorp, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Dalton jr, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Pilkington, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Katherine Venables. Ele faleceu em 1442, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Dalton родился в 1390 г. в местности алтаурп, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Dalton jr было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Pilkington, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Katherine Venables. Он умер в 1442 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Dalton nació en 1390, en Althorp, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Dalton jr, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Isabel de Pilkington, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Katherine Venables. Murió en 1442, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 52 años.
